articles.title: Show HN: A privacy first companion AI
articles.summary: I'm flabbergasted that people share their most sensitive messages with companion AI apps. Read their privacy policies. They can read your messages. They also have your email. That combination is a serious security threat.Replika was just fined €5M in Italy over exactly this.Yes, this is something I built. All inference runs on-device, no account, no chat data leaves your phone.Happy to defend every claim.www.friendai.pro https://apps.apple.com/au/app/friend-ai-private-chat/id67616... Comments UR

articles.title: Anthropic created a test marketplace for agent-on-agent commerce
articles.summary: In a recent experiment, Anthropic created a classified marketplace where AI agents represented both buyers and sellers, striking real deals for real goods and real money.

articles.title: Show HN: Routiium – self-hosted LLM gateway with a tool-result guard
articles.summary: Routiium is a self-hosted, OpenAI-compatible LLM gateway I built. It does the table-stakes things you'd expect — managed keys, routing, rate limits, analytics — but the part I want to flag for HN is what it does on the agent side. Most LLM gateways judge the user's prompt and stop there. Scan the input, decide if it looks malicious, allow or block. That's the easy half. In an agent loop with web-fetch, MCP, or shell tools, the harder problem is the tool's return value becoming the next message i

articles.title: OpenAI CEO apologizes to Tumbler Ridge community
articles.summary: In a letter to the residents of Tumbler Ridge, Canada, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said he is “deeply sorry” that his company failed to alert law enforcement about the suspect in a recent mass shooting.

articles.title: Why Tokyo is the most important tech destination of 2026
articles.summary: SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 has four tightly defined technology domains, each backed by live demonstrations, dedicated exhibit floors, and sessions featuring the people actually building and funding these technologies globally.

articles.title: ComfyUI hits $500M valuation as creators seek more control over AI-generated media
articles.summary: ComfyUI, whose tools give creators more control over AI image, video, and audio generation, just raised $30 million.

articles.title: Uber CTO Praveen Neppalli Naga joins stacked StrictlyVC SF lineup for April 30 event
articles.summary: Surprise! StrictlyVC San Francisco, which will kick off this year’s events lineup for TechCrunch on April 30 at the Sentro Filipino Cultural Center, is getting a new addition to its increasingly stacked lineup of speakers. Uber CTO Praveen Neppalli Naga will join the rest of the lineup to discuss operating at scale in the age of AI.
